svg.title: Cross-platform patch scanner — Windows, Linux, macOS
svg.desc: Three collector classes side by side, each feeding a shared JSON output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does system_info work on Windows?')
sendPrompt('How does installed_patches work on Windows?')
sendPrompt('How does update_history work on Windows?')
sendPrompt('How does missing_updates work on Windows?')
sendPrompt('How does defender_status work?')
sendPrompt('How does registry_apps work?')
sendPrompt('How does store_apps work?')
sendPrompt('How does drivers collection work on Windows?')
sendPrompt('How does firewall status work on Windows?')
sendPrompt('What does exe_scan do on Windows?')
sendPrompt('What does startup_programs collect on Windows?')
sendPrompt('How does system_info work on Linux?')
sendPrompt('How does installed_packages work on Linux?')
sendPrompt('How does kernel_patches work on Linux?')
sendPrompt('How does security_updates work on Linux?')
sendPrompt('How does patch_history work on Linux?')
sendPrompt('How does security_config work on Linux?')
sendPrompt('How does firewall work on Linux?')
sendPrompt('How does open_ports work on Linux?')
sendPrompt('How do snap and flatpak collectors work?')
sendPrompt('How does cron_jobs work on Linux?')
sendPrompt('How does journalctl error collection work?')
sendPrompt('How does system_info work on macOS?')
sendPrompt('How does software_updates work on macOS?')
sendPrompt('How does update_history work on macOS?')
sendPrompt('How does homebrew_packages work?')
sendPrompt('How does homebrew_outdated work?')
sendPrompt('How does app_store_apps work on macOS?')
sendPrompt('How does SIP and Gatekeeper check work?')
sendPrompt('How does FileVault check work?')
sendPrompt('How does open_ports work on macOS?')
sendPrompt('How does launchd services collection work?')
sendPrompt('How does login_items work on macOS?')
sendPrompt('Show me what the _summary block looks like in the JSON')
